blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,904 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder. Models disagree — check back.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
